mapper.select: select * from batch.job_definition where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into batch.job_definition ( tenant_id, job_code, job_name, job_type, biz_type, schedule_type, schedule_expr, timezone, worker_group, queue_code, calendar_code, window_code, trigger_mode, dag_enabled, shard_strategy, retry_policy, retry_max_count, timeout_seconds, execution_handler, param_schema, default_params, priority, enabled, description, created_by, updated_by ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{jobCode}, #{jobName}, #{jobType}, #{bizType}, #{scheduleType}, #{scheduleExpr}, #{timezone}, #{workerGroup}, #{queueCode}, #{calendarCode}, #{windowCode}, #{triggerMode}, #{dagEnabled}, #{shardStrategy}, #{retryPolicy}, #{retryMaxCount}, #{timeoutSeconds}, #{executionHandler}, #{paramSchema}::jsonb, #{defaultParams}::jsonb, #{priority}, #{enabled}, #{description}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy} )
mapper.update: update batch.job_definition set job_name = #{jobName}, queue_code = #{queueCode}, worker_group = #{workerGroup}, schedule_expr = #{scheduleExpr}, calendar_code = #{calendarCode}, window_code = #{windowCode}, retry_policy = #{retryPolicy}, retry_max_count = #{retryMaxCount}, timeout_seconds = #{timeoutSeconds}, shard_strategy = #{shardStrategy}, enabled = #{enabled}, description = #{description}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and job_code = #{jobCode}
mapper.delete: delete from batch.job_definition where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into batch.job_definition ( tenant_id, job_code, job_name, job_type, biz_type, schedule_type, schedule_expr, timezone, worker_group, queue_code, calendar_code, window_code, trigger_mode, dag_enabled, shard_strategy, retry_policy, retry_max_count, timeout_seconds, execution_handler, param_schema, default_params, priority, enabled, description, created_by, updated_by ) select tenant_id, #{newJobCode}, concat(job_name, ' (copy)'), job_type, biz_type, schedule_type, schedule_expr, timezone, worker_group, queue_code, calendar_code, window_code, trigger_mode, dag_enabled, shard_strategy, retry_policy, retry_max_count, timeout_seconds, execution_handler, param_schema, default_params, priority, false, description, #{createdBy}, #{createdBy} from batch.job_definition where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{sourceId}
